questions.objective_ref: LO1 — Name the four components of an AI agent and describe in plain language what each one does.
LO2 — Explain why an LLM on its own is not an agent, and what the other three components add.
LO3 — Describe what an agent's planning loop does and why it is necessary for multi-step tasks.
LO4 — Distinguish between short-term memory and long-term memory in the context of an agent.
LO5 — Explain what a tool is in the agent context and give two concrete examples.
LO6 — Identify the kinds of tasks where an agent is the right choice, versus tasks where a simpler approach is better.
